name: Ballex
short_description: In Ver.1.1 update, Ballex has added a new chapter: Chapter3, including new levels(13 to 17), with difficulty and challenges. We have optimized a lot of problems, added new screen Settings and so on. Go ahead and update it! Come and experience this difficult game! XD
detailed_description:
Workshop Available

Ballex maps workshop is available now!

You can create your own levels and upload them to Steam Workshop by using the Ballex Map Editor.


About the Game

Ballex is a 3D action-puzzle game with aesthetically pleasing graphics and intricate gameplay. You will need to control a ball that can alter between different physical states throughout the levels. You will face the challenges in different levels including a variety of weather conditions and monumental sky gardens. You need to utilize the structures around you and dodge between traps to clear the level.
Are you up for the challenge?

◆1.1Update◆


In this update, Ballex has added a new chapter: Chapter3, including new levels(13 to 17), with difficulty and challenges. We have optimized a lot of problems, added new screen Settings and so on. Go ahead and update it!

◆controls◆

Ballex gives players the ability to control the balls with agile movements. And you have option to remap their keys to make the gameplay most comfortable for your taste.

◆levels◆

Ballex 1.1 includes 17 different levels and difficulty increases gradually. We will add more levels in the future developments. By the way, you can also use creative workshops to download interesting levels created by other players.

◆level editor◆

Level editor of Ballex is available on Mac and PC. You can show off your creativity by making your own levels and upload them to Steam Workshop.

◆Inspired by Ballance◆
